positive: Minimalist, highly stylized design of a crescent moon cradling a constellation of abstract, geometric celestial bodies (stars, planets, comets). The style is neo-art deco celestial map, combining deep midnight sapphire blues with luminous gold leaf accents and stark matte blacks. Composition must feature a powerful central medallion suitable for high contrast printing on fabric. Emphasize sharp, clean silhouettes and radial symmetry. Lighting should be dramatic and internal, emanating solely from the 'stars' and 'moon', creating crisp edges and deep shadows. Aspect must be square for maximum apparel print impact. The overall feeling should be cosmic elegance and timeless mystery.
negative: blur, lowres, bad anatomy, multiple objects, text, watermark, signature, logo, jpeg artifacts, noise, extra limbs, messy lines, smudge, grain, cartoon, overly detailed
